results.title: Greg Cohen
highlights:
Enterprise AI Transformation Leader | Group Sr. Director, Global AI Enablement, Smurfit Westrock | Building the AI operating model for a Fortune 200 manufacturer
...
Most of the money pouring into enterprise AI is quietly going to waste — and it's rarely the technology's fault. People are either too uneasy to really use these tools, or burning time and tokens on scattered requests that were never tied to a real business goal. Closing that gap across 100,000 people in 40 countries is my job: giving AI a direction, a strategy, and enough trust that people reach for it on purpose. Here's what I've come to believe: for a company like ours, the models aren't the bottleneck. Brilliant people are making these tools more capable every month —
...
### Group Sr. Director, Global AI Enablement at [Smurfit Westrock](https://www.linkedin.com/company/smurfit-westrock) (Current)
...
Leading a newly created global AI Enablement function with accountability for AI strategy, governance, and adoption across 40 countries and a workforce of 100,000+ — focused on scaling beyond isolated pilots to production-grade AI programs. The mandate goes beyond technology selection. The harder — and more lasting — work is in how people engage with AI: building the trust, focus, and capability needed for adoption to become real, not theoretical. This function leads the AI Enablement layer of a broader AI leadership organization, in close partnership with the AI engineering team that owns build and deployment.
...
Responsible for digital experience ideation, innovation, strategy and operations on WestRock.com, integrating sales, marketing, IT and communications team members to create content, automate experiences, and continually measure / optimize engagement. Designed the cross-functional website governance team consisting of 35+ FTEs and several external agency partners overseeing Content Management, SEO, Analytics, Site Development, Tools & Data Integration, UX Design & Research, and Cybersecurity workstreams. Built the Commercial Content organization, producing hundreds of pieces of sales enablement and buyer enablement content for product marketing, thought leadership, paid media, customer presentations and demand generation content funnels. Built the Digital Content Experience design function, meshing user research, IA, UX, UI and brand design resources to build unique and innovative digital experiences to increase content performance and conversions (views, clicks, content engagement, content merchandizing, form captures. Serve on the Generative AI steering team, working with providers large and small to identify opportunities for injecting AI into our business. Responsible for leading marketing and communications pilots with generative AI to improve content effectiveness and production throughput. Additionally, responsible for identifying other use cases throughout the business and highlighting team members who are doing great work in order to share ideas and best practices across the enterprise.

results.title: Alp Ertem
highlights:
Lead Data Scientist at Smurfit Westrock Company | Predictive and Prescriptive Analytics, Operations Research
...
Lead Data Scientist at [Smurfit Westrock](https://www.linkedin.com/company/smurfit-westrock)
...
I am a Lead Data Scientist at Smurfit Westrock, a leading provider of paper and packaging solutions. With a PhD in Industrial Engineering from the University of Arkansas and over 15 years of experience in data science and operations research, I help Smurfit Westrock enhance and maintain a large-scale supply chain optimization application that maximizes efficiency and profitability. My core competencies include prescriptive analytics, machine learning, statistical data analysis, and tools such as SQL, IBM OPL Studio, CPLEX, Python, and R. I have a strong track record of applying these skills to solve complex problems in diverse fields, from manufacturing and logistics to disaster relief. Some of my notable achievements include improving energy efficiency and electricity pricing for aerospace composite production, reducing response time for disaster relief delivery, developing a driver risk model and a load forecasting model for intermodal transportation, and balancing chassis network flow for railroad carriers. My mission is to leverage the power of data to drive growth and innovation for organizations and society.
...

...
- Enhance and maintain a large-scale supply chain optimization application deployed via IBM Decision Optimization Center using CPLEX
- Answer complex business questions regarding optimal machine allocations, schedules and transportation mode alternatives
- Design experiments, run and analyze what-if scenarios with varying operational parameters
- Communicate the analysis results with business determining cause and effect relations
...
- Use creative visual representations of Big Data

results.title: Gaizka Albestain Irineo
highlights:
AI | Data Engineering Manager en Smurfit Westrock
...
Data Engineering Manager at [Smurfit Westrock](https://www.linkedin.com/company/smurfit-westrock)
...
### Data Engineering Manager at [Smurfit Westrock](https://www.linkedin.com/company/smurfit-westrock) (Current)
...
Led data analytics and AI engineering initiatives within the Smurfit Westrock Group, playing a key role in defining and executing the analytics platform strategy during the post-merger integration of Smurfit Kappa and WestRock. Held end-to-end responsibility for a strategic Proof of Concept aimed at unifying two heterogeneous analytics ecosystems—AWS- and Qlik-based analytics (WestRock) and SAP-centric analytics (Smurfit Kappa)—into a single enterprise analytics platform based on Microsoft Fabric. Coordinated and governed mixed internal and external teams, including internal data engineers, Deloitte (enterprise analytics & data platform), Pebble (advanced analytics & BI), and Oxya (infrastructure & SAP operations), ensuring alignment across development, analytics, and infrastructure streams. Acted as primary technology liaison with executive stakeholders, regularly presenting architecture decisions, progress, risks, and outcomes to Vice President and senior leadership, supporting informed strategic decision-making. Engaged directly with strategic technology vendors (Microsoft and SAP) to align platform capabilities, architecture choices, and roadmap considerations with Smurfit Westrock’s long-term analytics and data strategy. Successfully delivered the PoC on time and within scope, leading to the adoption of Microsoft Fabric as a strategic analytics platform for the newly formed Smurfit Westrock Group. Contributed to the definition of governance models, delivery standards, and roadmap planning for data engineering, analytics, and AI initiatives at group level. Continued responsibility for leading and mentoring a core team of senior professionals, managing external vendors and budgets, and driving analytics initiatives across Manufacturing Intelligence, Supply Chain, and MES domains, ensuring scalability and long-term sustainability of the platform.
...
Team Management | Mentoring | Recruiting MES System Solution Architect: Responsible for the solution architecture of MES systems (SAP MII) across all paper plants in the group. Supply Chain Analytical Systems: In charge of evolutions, maintenance and improvements in the area. Artificial Intelligence Project Manager: Real-time prediction of the likelihood of paper breaks in paper machines. Clustering of suppliers (SAP database). Spare Parts Harmonization. LLM for internal assistance Real-Time Solutions for DCS in Paper Machines: Responsible for architecture, development, and implementation of real-time solutions. Hybrid architecture between MII and ECC data, displaying results in real-time dashboards using Python, React, Flask. Pilot currently operational in a Netherlands plant with ongoing rollout in UK mills. Project Management | BPI Analysis | BW MII Solution Rollout Manager | BW Core Solution Rollout Third-Level Support (SAP BW): Providing third-level support across all modules. Technical Expertise: SAP BI HANA Architect, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, SAP BW, Business Objects Data Services, Python, R, SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), Power BI, Databases, Scripting.

### https://www.linkedin.com/posts/arianeschiereck_ai-enterpriseai-digitaltransformation-activity-7461185142594809856-DfQi
...
Activity: Daniel Norrell liked this
...
Reflecting on an energizing week at Sapphire where one thing became unmistakably clear: AI is rapidly reshaping the future operating model of the enterprise.
...
Two key takeaways stood out clearly for me.
...
First, the transformative impact of AI on business scale, speed, and decision-making is no longer theoretical. We are rapidly moving toward enterprises where AI can augment and autonomously execute workflows, accelerate insights, improve customer engagement, and fundamentally reshape how businesses operate.
...
Second, companies will not realize this value on fragmented data, disconnected processes, and heavily customized legacy environments. The organizations that will lead in the next era are the ones modernizing now — establishing trusted data foundations, simplifying architectures, embedding governance early, and redesigning workflows with AI and humans operating together.
...
I also had the opportunity to speak as a panelist in EY’s Experience Room on “Data & AI and the Autonomous Enterprise” — a fantastic discussion on what it really takes to move from AI pilots to enterprise-scale value creation.
...
Exciting times ahead. The pace of change is accelerating — and so is the opportunity for companies willing to rethink not just technology, but the operating model itself. #AI #EnterpriseAI #DigitalTransformation #AgenticAI #DataStrategy #AutonomousEnterprise #CIOLeadership #SAPSapphire
...

# Sr. Anlst, Financial Systems
...

...

- ATR57073

- GA WFH Georgia

- Relocation Support
- No
...
Smurfit Westrock (NYSE:SW) is a global leader in sustainable paper and packaging solutions. We are materials scientists, packaging designers, mechanical engineers and manufacturing experts with a shared purpose: Innovate Boldly. Package Sustainably. Guided by our values of integrity, respect, accountability and excellence, we use leading science and technology to move fiber-based packaging forward.
...
Smurfit WestRock (NYSE: SW) is a global leader in sustainable paper and packaging solutions. We are materials scientists, packaging designers, mechanical engineers, and manufacturing experts with a shared purpose: Innovate Boldly. Package Sustainably. Guided by our values of integrity, respect, accountability, and excellence, we use leading science and technology to move fiber-based packaging forward.
...
- Our technology organization is transforming how we work at Smurfit WestRock. We align with our businesses to deliver innovative solutions that:
- Address business challenges and enable smarter decision-making
- Align technology investment to outcomes that move the company forward
- Reinvent how we operate using modern digital tools, automation, and data insight
...
We are looking for financial and analytical thinkers who thrive in dynamic environments and can support IT transformation through disciplined financial management, transparency, and partnership across global regions.
...
Smurfit WestRock's Consumer IT & Digital organization is modernizing its operational and technology landscape across the U.S. and EMEA. To support accurate financial stewardship, capital governance, and operational insight across this portfolio, we are adding a Financial Analyst - Consumer IT & Digital to our technology finance team.
...
This role provides end-to-end financial planning and forecasting coverage across capital projects, operating expense, and IT portfolio spend. This position partners closely with Consumer IT leadership, Corporate Finance, Global Finance, PMO teams, and Business Unit owners to deliver clear, reliable financial visibility that drives better decisions.
...
Sr. Analyst, Financial Systems
...
### Position Summary
...
The Financial Analyst supports financial reporting, forecasting, budget management, and capital project tracking for Consumer IT. This role consolidates U.S. + EMEA financials, enables cost transparency, and builds financial processes that increase accountability, speed, and insight for technology leadership.
...
- How You Will Impact WestRock
- Lead monthly forecasting, reporting, and variance analysis across OpEx, CapEx, and IT P&L
- Track capital project spend, budget alignment, risk flags, and financial control requirements
- Consolidate U.S. and EMEA financials for Consumer IT leadership and CIDO visibility
- Partner with BU owners to support budget planning, approvals, and portfolio review
...
- Build consistent financial reporting models, dashboards, and governance with Apptio/PAS/Hyperion
- Improve transparency into cost-to-serve, run-rate spend, and investment performance
- Ensure compliance with corporate finance policies, internal controls, audit readiness, and SOX
...
- Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, Business, or related field (required)
- 3+ years' experience in FP&A, business partnering, or IT finance role
- Strong skills in forecasting, variance modeling, and capital vs. operating accounting
- Advanced Excel required; experience with Hyperion, Apptio, JDE/DAS, PAS preferred
...
- Ability to communicate clearly with senior leaders and cross-functional teams
- Detail-driven, analytical thinker with strength in financial governance and controls

results.title: Sr. Anlst, Cyber Security | Hirevector
highlights:
# Sr. Anlst, Cyber Security
...
Smurfit Westrock (NYSE:SW) is a global leader in sustainable paper and packaging solutions. We are materials scientists, packaging designers, mechanical engineers and manufacturing experts with a shared purpose: Innovate Boldly. Package Sustainably. Guided by our values of integrity, respect, accountability and excellence, we use leading science and technology to move fiber-based packaging forward.
...
- Our technology organization is transforming how we work at Smurfit Westrock. We align with our businesses to deliver innovative solutions that:
...
- Address specific business challenges, integrate processes, and create great experiences
- Connect our work to shared goals that propel Smurfit Westrock forward in the Digital Age
- Imagine how technology can advance the way we work by using disruptive technology
- We are looking for forward thinking technologists that can accelerate our focus areas such as building stronger foundational technology capabilities, reducing complexity, employing digital transformation concepts, and leveraging disruptive technology.
...
Senior Penetration Tester - Remote
...
The Senior Penetration Tester plays a critical role in Smurfit WestRock's offensive security strategy by executing advanced, realworld attack simulations across a broad range of applications, infrastructure, cloud services, and emerging technologies. This role leads the planning, execution, and reporting of inscope penetration testing engagements designed to uncover weaknesses in security controls and strengthen the organization's overall cyber resilience.
...
Operating as a key member of the Cyber Defense organization, the Senior Penetration Tester partners closely with Business Units, Vulnerability Management, Application Security, the Security Operations Center, and other technical teams to ensure findings are understood, riskprioritized, and actionable. The tester will participate in engagement scoping, develop test plans aligned with Smurfit WestRock's Penetration Testing Program and Rules of Engagement, and deliver clear, highquality technical and executivelevel reporting.
...
This role will also be instrumental in shaping and maturing Smurfit WestRock's internal Penetration Testing and Red Team program, contributing to methodology development, toolset enhancement, and crossfunctional process alignment. As a senior member of the team, the individual will provide mentorship, guidance, and technical leadership to other testers, helping to build a strong, scalable offensive security capability across the enterprise.
...

...
a strong emphasis on web application vulnerabilities, including OWASP

10, API security flaws, and
...
logic abuse.

enhance internal offensive capabilities and testing automation.

evolving offensive security landscape, including emerging threats

, and testing

- 4-6 years of handson experience in offensive cybersecurity, including Penetration Testing, Red Teaming, Cloud Security Testing, and Network Security Testing.
...
- Demonstrated expertise in Web Application Security, including dynamic/static analysis, API exploitation techniques, and modern application attack paths.
...
- Red Team experience-such as adversary emulation, social engineering simulations, or purpleteam collaboration-is strongly preferred.

IT Digital Analyst - Digital Acceleration at [Smurfit Westrock](https://www.linkedin.com/company/smurfit-westrock)

I’m a recent graduate from Georgia State University, where I earned my degree in Computer Information Systems with a focus on data, technology, and business strategy. During college, I gained hands-on experience through internships at Smurfit WestRock and Georgia-Pacific, where I worked on projects involving ERP implementation, data analysis, and process optimization. Currently, I’m an IT/Digital Analyst at Smurfit WestRock, part of the Technology Leadership Development Program (TLDP). In this role, I’m rotating through key technology teams to deepen my understanding of digital transformation across the enterprise. I'm currently working within Digital Acceleration, where we build scalable tech solutions that drive internal efficiency and innovation. I’m passionate about bridging the gap between business needs and technical solutions—whether that’s through automation, clean data, or building systems that just work better. I’m always looking to learn, solve real problems, and collaborate with teams that move fast and think big.

results.title: Sri Devarakonda
highlights:
Senior Director, IT Solutions at [Smurfit Westrock](https://www.linkedin.com/company/smurfit-westrock)
...
As Senior IT Director, I Lead,Advance,Transform,Integrate,Deliver and Run IT Business Services. From Strategy to Execution, I specialize in Best-in-Class Technologies such as SAP S4,Oracle,o9 and many other Tier1 Apps. Areas of expertise include Supply Chain end-to-end integrated Planning, Logistics Procurement & Operations, Forestry & Recycle Operations, Procure to Payment Transformation & Operations, Order to Cash execution. Responsibilities include leading technology strategy, delivery, and operations across North America's region that run critical complex business functions managing a budget of $4B in annual spend. I manage multi-million dollar program and operations portfolio, lead large teams, ensuring technology investments & operations directly enable business performance, resilience, and growth. I build and empower high‑performing teams, champion simplification and automation, and strengthen governance, compliance, and cybersecurity across the enterprise. My focus is delivering measurable outcomes, optimizing cost and risk, and aligning IT strategy with executive‑level business priorities. With deep expertise in SAP ECC, S/4 transformations and platforms including Oracle, Manhattan Associates, o9, Blue Yonder, GEP, Ariba, Icertis, and Coupa, I have a strong track record of modernizing supply chain, order‑to‑cash, procurement, and end‑to‑end enterprise processes. I leverage AI and emerging technologies to solve complex challenges and build scalable, future‑ready capabilities. I am known for strong C‑suite partnerships, clear translation of complex IT decisions into business value, and effective leadership of strategic vendor relationships and negotiations. My goal is to deliver innovative, efficient technology solutions that drive operational excellence and sustainable growth. Manager, Pricing & Estimation at [Smurfit Westrock](https://www.linkedin.com/company/smurfit-westrock)
...
Leading the design phase of an ERP replacement with SAP was a journey of precision and strategic planning. Ensuring every specification met the project's logistics requirements was just the beginning. 🚀 Through comprehensive business analysis, we identified enhancement areas, creating detailed functional designs for clear stakeholder communication. The migration of historical data to the new platform was a critical task, executed with a focus on accuracy and minimal downtime. 📊 Mock go-live exercises and end-to-end system testing were pivotal in mitigating risks and confirming system readiness. As the 'Test Ninja', I spearheaded a collaborative effort for thorough testing and project milestones. 🥋 Training programs and interactive recordings were implemented, empowering continuous learning. Mentoring a team of analysts, we drove the business intelligence strategy, harmonizing data from various systems into a unified source for operational and financial logistics. 📈 Collaboration with business partners and developers enhanced our dashboards and reports, fostering a culture of self-service data access for optimized decision-making. This journey was not just about technology, but about fostering a positive, team-oriented work environment that challenges the status quo. 💡 #Leadership #SAP #ERPImplementation #DataHarmonization #BusinessIntelligence #ProjectManagement #Innovation #SupplyChain #Logistics #PowerBI #Alteryx #WestRock #TheHomeDepot #Analytics #BusinessIntelligence

# Data Scientist + ML Engineer (Gen AI)
...
- Data Scientist + ML Engineer (Gen AI)
...
- We are looking for a highly skilled Data Scientist + ML Engineer (Generative AI) to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for developing, fine-tuning, and applying advanced generative AI models - including diffusion models, large language models (LLMs), and other state-of-the-art architectures. You will collaborate closely with cross-functional partners in research, data engineering, and operations to deliver high-quality machine learning solutions and scalable datasets.
...
- Design and Implement LLM-Driven Synthetic Data Pipelines: Design and build workflows using LLMs and Gen AI techniques to create high-volume, high-quality synthetic data for model training and testing.
...
- Design, implement, and deploy machine learning models with a focus on generative AI (diffusion models, LLMs, and related architectures)
...
- Fine-tune, evaluate, and optimize large language models for specific downstream tasks and data needs
...
- Develop and maintain scalable data pipelines supporting training, evaluation, and inference workflows
...
- Partner cross-functionally with researchers, engineers, and data program managers to define requirements and deliver high-impact ML solutions
...
- REQUIRED EXPERIENCE AND SKILLS:
...
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field from an accredited U.S. institution
- 2+ years of experience in Machine Learning or Software Engineering
- Expert-level proficiency in Python and familiarity with deep learning frameworks such as PyTorch
...
- Strong foundation in machine learning algorithms, data preprocessing, and evaluation techniques
...
- Demonstrated experience working with diffusion models, stable diffusion, or large language models (LLMs)

results.title: Senior, Data Scientist at Walmart | Jeremy
highlights:
# Senior, Data Scientist
...
Sunnyvale, CAHybridSeniorML / AI
...
Senior ML engineer on Walmart's Catalog Data Science team building production GenAI and deep learning models for product attribute extraction, classification, and catalog optimization at petabyte scale.
...
About Team The Catalog Data Science Team at Walmart Global Tech is focused on using the latest research in generative AI (GenAI), artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML), statistics, deep learning, computer vision and optimization to implement solutions that ensure Walmart’s product catalog is accurate, complete, and optimized for customer experience. Our team tackles complex data science and ML engineering challenges related to product classification, attribute extraction, trust & safety, and catalog optimization, empowering next-generation retail use cases. We take pride in writing solid production code in Python, deploying and supporting model services and pipelines, and pushing the boundaries in latency, throughput, and scalability.
...
As a Senior Data Scientist (Machine Learning Engineer) on the Catalog Data Quality team, you will collaborate with other Data Scientists and ML Engineers to develop, deploy, and scale machine learning models in production to extract attributes from product information. You will play a key role in supporting the attribute extraction platform and catalog data quality solutions — adding capabilities and driving adoption of GenAI-powered solutions to increase the coverage and accuracy of the Walmart's product catalog. The Data Science and ML Engineering community at Walmart Global Tech is active in most of the Hack events, utilizing the petabytes of data at our disposal, to build some of the coolest ideas. All the work we do at Walmart Global Tech will eventually benefit our operations & our associates, helping Customers Save Money to Live Better.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy AI/ML, NLP, LLM models into production environments with a focus on reliability and scalability. Own the full model lifecycle — from experimentation and offline evaluation through serving, monitoring, and iterative improvement in production.
...
- Demonstrated history of strong hands-on experience in AI/ML modeling
...
- Hands-on experience with Generative AI technologies: LLMs, multimodal models, RAG architectures, prompt engineering, and fine-tuning (LoRA/QLoRA)
...
- Prior Experience in building GenAI, DL, Vision-based models.
...
- Strong foundation in classical ML, deep learning, and modern architectures — CNNs, Transformers, and domain-specific variants
...
Mandatory Skills: Machine Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, Deep-learning, Python, GenAI Additional Qualifications: Good to have experience in areas such as LLM Optimization.
...

results.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer, AI Platform at Smartly · JobsRadar
highlights:
Senior Machine Learning Engineer, AI Platform at Smartly · JobsRadar
...
Jobs› Companies› Smartly› Senior Machine Learning Engineer, AI Platform
...
## About this Senior Machine Learning Engineer, AI Platform role at Smartly
...
We are looking for a Senior Machine Learning Engineer to join the AI Platform Team at Smartly! Our team works on helping marketers make the most of their ad creatives (images, video, text) and campaigns (product and performance data). We build and experiment with AI-based solutions across the media and creative workflows.You will have the opportunity to take ownership of and work on high impact projects.
...
Join us in building high impact ML-based solutions to help our customers to build better and more effective advertising experiences for their consumers. If you’re a growth minded individual who has a passion for ML and the marketing space, this team is for you!
...
### As a Senior Machine Learning Engineer, you’ll:
...
- Build ML-based software systems that enable our users to craft great advertising experiences and campaigns
...
- Work with a large span of datasets from image to video to audio to text to structured performance data.
...
- Contribute to and strengthen Smartly’s MLOps + data platform. You’ll work alongside our stellar senior machine learning engineers, data scientists, and software engineers to enable us to productionize AI/ML applications more robustly and efficiently.
...
- Keep up to date with the latest ML innovations, especially in areas such as generative AI, computer vision, natural language processing and explainability.
...
### What we are looking for:
...
- 5+ years of experience developing and deploying production-quality software
- 2+ years of experience delivering software services powered by machine learning
- 2+ years of experience working with cloud infrastructure such as AWS or GCP
- Fluent in Python; experience with C++ or Java is a plus
- Hands-on experience with modern ML frameworks (e.g., PyTorch, TensorFlow)
- Knowledge of MLOps concepts and tools (e.g., MLflow, Kubeflow)
...
- Experience in feature engineering, model evaluation, diagnostics, and monitoring
...
- Strong foundation in linear algebra, statistics, and calculus
...
- Experience building scalable data pipelines for ML-based data processing
...
Smartly is the AI-powered advertising technology company transforming ad experiences for brands and their consumers. Our comprehensive advertising platform seamlessly integrates the capabilities of media, creative, and intelligence to power more than 800 billion impressions and generate more than 300 billion creatives annually, delivering tangible business outcomes for brands and advertisers.
